miwi        2009-03-16 21:11:39 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    deskutils            Makefile 
  Added files:
    deskutils/gtg        Makefile distinfo pkg-descr pkg-plist 
    deskutils/gtg/files  patch-GTG___init__.py patch-gtg.desktop 
  Log:
  GTG is a personal organizer for the GNOME desktop environment,
  it focuses on ease of use and flexibility, while keeping things
  simple.
  
  WWW: http://gtg.fritalk.com/
  
  PR:             ports/132676
  Submitted by:   Ruslan Mahmatkhanov <cvs-src at yandex.ru>
